title: teratophyllum aculeatum var. aculeatum
intro: Teratophyllum aculeatum var. aculeatum, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in some traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
